name: Contoso Feature Flags
description: Feature toggles to control capability rollout across environments. Flags allow gradual enablement of new features without redeployment.

flags.name: ENABLE_ML_SCORING
flags.description: Enable real-time ML model scoring in data pipelines (churn prediction, demand forecast). When disabled, pipelines skip the ML enrichment step.
flags.rollout_plan: Enable in prod after model validation achieves >85% accuracy on holdout set. Target: Q4 2025.
flags.impact_if_disabled: Pipelines produce output without ML-enriched columns (e.g., churn_probability, demand_forecast).

flags.name: ENABLE_REALTIME_DASHBOARD
flags.description: Enable DirectQuery-based real-time monitoring dashboard with auto-refresh. When disabled, dashboard uses scheduled import mode.
flags.rollout_plan: Already enabled in both environments. Monitor capacity impact.
flags.impact_if_disabled: Real-time monitoring report falls back to 15-minute scheduled refresh.

flags.name: ENABLE_DATA_QUALITY_ALERTS
flags.description: Enable automated data quality checks that fire alerts via Data Activator when anomalies are detected (null rates, volume drops, schema drift).
flags.rollout_plan: Disabled in dev to avoid alert noise during development. Enabled in prod for production monitoring.
flags.impact_if_disabled: Data quality issues are only caught during manual review or downstream report inspection.

flags.name: ENABLE_COST_ALLOCATION
flags.description: Enable per-department capacity usage tracking and cost allocation tagging. Adds metadata to all Fabric operations for chargeback reporting.
flags.rollout_plan: Not needed in dev (shared capacity). Required in prod for departmental chargeback at $0.36/CU-hour.
flags.impact_if_disabled: Capacity costs are tracked at tenant level only; no per-department breakdown.
